_comment: RLS policies for the OL data governance framework. Table names should be bare table names (e.g. 'instructor_module_report') when datasets are registered without a schema in Superset, or 'schema.table_name' when a schema is set. The apply_rls_policies.py script indexes datasets by both formats and resolves the policy table names to IDs via the Superset REST API at deploy time. Jinja clauses use current_email() which returns the authenticated user's email address as stored in the Superset user record (sourced from the Keycloak 'email' JWT claim via CustomSsoSecurityManager). The instructor course-scope subquery identifies staff/instructor-mode enrollments as the signal for course ownership.

rls_filters.name: instructor_course_scope
rls_filters.description: Restricts per-learner engagement and reporting datasets to courses the instructor teaches. Instructor course ownership is determined by enrollment mode 'instructor' or 'staff' in marts__combined_course_enrollment_detail.
rls_filters.clause: courserun_readable_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT courserun_readable_id FROM ol_warehouse_production_mart.marts__combined_course_enrollment_detail WHERE user_email = '{{ current_email() }}' AND courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode IN ('instructor', 'staff'))

rls_filters.name: instructor_enrollment_scope_with_term_expiry
rls_filters.description: Restricts enrollment-detail datasets to the instructor's own courses and enforces a 30-day post-term access window. Both constraints are combined in one clause because the table exposes courserun_end_on.
rls_filters.clause: courserun_readable_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT courserun_readable_id FROM ol_warehouse_production_mart.marts__combined_course_enrollment_detail WHERE user_email = '{{ current_email() }}' AND courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode IN ('instructor', 'staff')) AND courserun_end_on >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY

rls_filters.name: admin_engineer_course_scope_bypass
rls_filters.description: Base filter that exempts Admin and ol_data_engineer from all course-scope and term-expiry RLS on per-learner datasets. Engineers and platform admins need unrestricted access for pipeline development, data validation, and support.
